outcome_summary: Phase 1.5.5 closes — ADR 0036 authors expression contract for inward-facing documentation (kindred tool to AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md, separately scoped). Operational surface docs/operations/document-voice.md; amendment discipline inverts ADR 0027 (refinements cheap, posture changes expensive); docs/operations/session-shutdown-sequence.md date-marker rule revised to align. ADR count: 36 total (34 Accepted + 2 Superseded). User course-corrected framing twice mid-session: 'kindred tools, separately scoped' is the settled frame, not 'facets of one contract' (drawer captures both course-corrections verbatim). tools/validate.py clean (0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns) across 3 commits: 756ef11 (eager-claim), dd0e60c (artifact batch — ADR 0036 + document-voice.md + index updates + shutdown-sequence revision), ed2193e (STATE.md + CHANGELOG.md close). MemPalace decision drawer drawer_paideia_general_89eaa4e70c1b0581422a8381 carries verbatim conversational story including pattern lessons. Cleanup deferred: S-0018 mechanical sweep across docs/business.md (34 revision-narration tokens) / docs/architecture.md (29) / docs/MISSION.md (24) / docs/content-strategy.md (11) / AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md opening blockquote / boundary cases (tensions.md open entries, adr/README.md orientation prose); S-0019 ROADMAP.md substantive cleanup.
